Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege facts in support of each element of the cause of action for invasion of privacy; and to allege justiciable present controversy as to each Plaintiff regarding a coming up lease renewal recertification requiring investitive consumer report.

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to the request for punitive damages. Punitive damages are sufficiently stated under CC 1786.50(b). Motion is granted as to the request for injunctive a equitable relief under the first cause of action.

Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)
